items.claim: Sean O'Malley was out-wrestled over five rounds in his fight against Merab Dvalishvili.
items.quote: Sean O'Malley getting out-wrestled uh over five rounds

items.claim: Ciryl Gane has significantly improved his boxing ability compared to his older performances.
items.quote: Ciryl Gane is really showing that he can box now.

items.claim: Poatan's performance was negatively impacted by weighing in at 251 lbs instead of a lighter weight.
items.quote: I feel like Poatan being up at 251 was a mistake in hindsight

items.claim: Poatan lost his ability to slip strikes and looked flat due to his increased weight.
items.quote: he lost his, you know, ability to slip. He just looked a little flat

items.claim: Ciryl Gane landed nine illegal strikes to the back of Poatan's head during the finishing sequence.
items.quote: I COUNTED NINE punches and elbows to the back of the head of Poatan.
